meaning: n.鲍斯爵士(亚瑟王传奇的圆桌骑士之一,兰斯洛特爵士之侄)
examples: When you gonna leave bors and come home with me?
Other famous Round Table Knights included Lancelot, Bedevere, Bors, Galahad, Perceval and Modred..
However, both the 27-year-old Mr Bors and Mr Perkins, who is 22 years older, are most concerned about the prospects for the next generation.
